title: Upon Himself Being Buried.
content:
Let me sleep this night away,
    Till the dawning of the day;
    Then at th' opening of mine eyes
    I, and all the world, shall rise.
meaning:
"Upon Himself Being Buried." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
